description:
A lightweight, developer-focused database management tool. Supports MySQL, PostgreSQL and SQLite. Hackable with plugins. Built for speed, security, and aesthetics.


See the assets to download this version and install.
What's Changed
- fix: normalize blog post dates to ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS) by @debba in #92
- fix(blog): make tag filter dropdown inline instead of overlay by @debba in #93
Full Changelog: v0.9.9...v0.9.10
